ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host who owns the property */,
  "host_identity_verified" TEXT /* Verification status of the host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Neighbourhood group where the property is located */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighbourhood where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "instant_bookable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property can be booked instantly */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the property */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt) */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the property was constructed */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per night */,
  "service_fee" TEXT /* Service fee for the property */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the property has received */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Number of reviews per month */,
  "review_rate_number" INTEGER /* Average review rating */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings the host has */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the property is available for booking in a year */,
  "house_rules" TEXT /* House rules for guests */,
  "license" TEXT /* License or permit number for the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "photos" TEXT /* URLs of property photos */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "last_cleaning_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last cleaned */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit required for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighbourhood_group FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_group") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_group"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_room_type FOREIGN KEY ("room_type") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_cancellation_policy FOREIGN KEY ("cancellation_policy") REFERENCES cancellation_policies ("policy_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the host */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the host is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the host is based */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code where the host is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the host is based */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the host */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the host account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the host account was last updated */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the host */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Average response time of the host */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Host's response rate (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Neighbourhood group (e.g., Brooklyn, Manhattan) */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighbourhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighbourhood */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent in the neighbourhood */,
  "public_transport" INTEGER /* Indicates if public transport is easily accessible */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancellation policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation policy */,
  "cancellation_fee" REAL /* Cancellation fee as a percentage of the total price */,
  "refund_policy" TEXT /* Detailed description of the refund policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy for the room type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the guest */,
  "response" TEXT /* Host's response to the review */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the host responded to the review */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the guest is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the guest is based */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code where the guest is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the guest is based */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the guest account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the guest account was last updated */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* URL of the guest's profile photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the guest */,
  "trusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest is trusted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "num_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests staying */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the booking was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the availability is recorded */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is available for booking on the specified date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the availability was last updated */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking on the specified date */,
  "maximum_stay" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for booking on the specified date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License or permit number */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the license */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the license */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the license needs to be renewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
